_comment: Esplora/blockchain-explorer style export: inputs/outputs are OBJECTS with prev_addr / scriptpubkey_address keys, and txids come in as 'hash'. cryptotrace's parser coerces these to its Transaction model. The single real SDN entry is the Hydra Market address (1AdraFvB8Ads5KFFGZQUgYvuhMQVjUuk5j, RUSSIA-EO14024); all others are fictional placeholders.
